name: Chocolate Toys (Do Not Bake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the peanut butter, powdered sugar, and melted butter in a large bowl.
2. Add the chopped nuts, coconut, and Rice Krispies to the mixture. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Shape the mixture into rounds or logs and chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.
FROSTING
1. Melt the chocolate chips, butter, and a little milk together over low heat.
2. Remove from heat and mix gently until smooth.
3. Spread the frosting over the chilled cookies.
